item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-013","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response reconstructs the whole business object instead of accepting the bean-only premise: it explicitly mentions location/traffic conversion, repeat purchase, per-area efficiency, brand recognition, operational stability, training, materials, and activities. It evaluates beans as a product hook/foundation rather than the sole cause, then writes bounded招商文案 around that framing. It does not produce the fail-signal copy that says beans decide everything."}
